main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'sílice coloidal/polimerizada etapa 2 + recovery 75→82 sin recalcular' literal.

recommended_action.justification: Reducir recovery 75% + CIP NaOH pH 12 35-40°C 4-6h — match gold ACT 1.

requested_data.justification: Pide autopsia + análisis lavado CIP sílice — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi-condición: depósito CaCO3 o biológico (alto orgánico/ATP) → switch.
